name: briarthorn
description: CMake presets for various platforms and configurations.

qt.description: Qt Quick rendering (the CMake desktop presets enable this; the zig build installs the manifest without features and keeps the raylib renderer)

dependencies.$comment: Host-tool Qt (qmlcachegen, qsb, moc) with the default features (icu, openssl, sql, dbus, widgets, ...) stripped; the ports re-add the few they need (e.g. qtshadertools adds gui).
dependencies.name: qtbase

dependencies.$comment: Target Qt trimmed to what Qt Quick rendering needs on each platform's default backend: OpenGL on desktop, GLES2/EGL on android and wasm, xcb windowing + fontconfig font discovery on linux, freetype on wasm (no system fonts in the browser sandbox). qtdeclarative itself re-adds network and testlib.
dependencies.name: qtbase

features.$comment: Not needed by Quick, but qtbase 6.11 only links libresolv into QtNetwork under dnslookup AND libresolv (src/network/CMakeLists.txt), while qhostinfo_unix.cpp needs it under libresolv alone - without dnslookup the QtNetwork dylib fails to link (undefined _res_9_ninit) on macOS/Linux. Dependency-free, so keeping it restores Qt's tested configuration.
features.name: dnslookup
